nodes.label: Executive Report — Thunder Group ม.ค.–พ.ค. 2569 (full months + projections, HTML)
nodes.rationale: Full-month apple-to-apple 5-month view (group total ฿51,002,710; May all-time high ฿11,523,721). Notes sub-segments over-count EasySlip total by ~฿53.7K/month (must reconcile before forecasting) and that analysis was cross-checked via AI Debate (Codex+Gemini+Claude+Typhoon).

nodes.label: EasySlip API concentration risk
nodes.rationale: EasySlip API = 97.5% of EasySlip revenue (up from 96.3% in Jan; 96.9% in the Apr–May MTD view) and ~54% of the whole group — single point of failure ฿6.26M/month; one bad month kills the ฿125M target. Action: map top-10 customer concentration and lock long-term contracts + SLA + churn penalties if whales >20–30%.

nodes.label: May 2569 spike validation (recurring vs one-off)
nodes.rationale: 85% of the May +฿1.51M increase came from two API chunks (EasySlip API +฿1.01M, Thunder API +฿278K) — could be annual prepay or one-off deals, not recurring. Rule set by the report: do not present the ฿131M run-rate to the board before confirming recurrence and reconciling the ~฿53.7K sub-segment gap.

nodes.label: Full-year 2569 projection scenarios (Bear/Base/Bull)
nodes.rationale: Bear ~฿121M (97%, May was one-off spike, revert to ~฿10.0M/mo) · Base ~฿126–127M (101%, moderate API growth offsets normalization) · Bull ~฿132–140M+ (105–112%, hold May level). Key framing: 'holding May's ฿11.5M' is the Bull case, not Base, because May is an API-spike-driven all-time high. COO bottom line: target achievable in every non-shock scenario; strategy = protect/diversify EasySlip API base → accelerate Thunder API → sustain BOT / reprice BoostSMS / cut Flex.

hyperedges.label: API-led growth engine driving the ฿125M target (both brands' APIs + PMF signal + spike validation)
